_note: Each high-priority UI cue's covering SFX onsets ON its event frame: pin_drop.wav onset 11.72s vs pin event 11.70s (delta 0.02s); card_whoosh.wav onset 12.42s vs card event 12.40s (delta 0.02s); card_chime.wav uses a -120ms transient_offset_ms so its onset (27.32 - 0.12 = 27.20s) lands on the pop event at 27.18s (delta 0.02s); pin_tock.wav onset 104.00s vs pin event 103.98s (delta 0.02s). All within the 0.08s frame-lock for impulsive one-shots.
